vt:vector.vt:lpstr: Stewardship Report: Provides a comprehensive, year-over-year view of pharmacy plan performance, utilization, and cost trends. This offers executive-level insights to support strategic planning, budgeting, and vendor performance review.
Top Drugs Report: Identifies the top 50 drugs by ingredient cost and usage. This report pinpoints high-cost medications driving plan spend and targeted intervention opportunities.
Large Claimant Report: Highlights high-cost individual claimants and their prescription spend. This report helps assess risk concentration and potential stop-loss impact.
Multi-Source Brand Report: Lists brand drugs with available generic equivalents. This report identifies cost-saving opportunities by switching to generics.

NADAC Differential Report: Compares actual drug costs to NADAC (National Average Drug Acquisition Cost) benchmarks. This report flags inflated drug pricing and evaluates PBM contract performance for transparency and pricing fairness.

Repricing Report: Models cost across multiple PBM vendors based on historical claims data. This supports PBM selection and renewal decisions by quantifying potential savings under alternative pricing arrangements.

Reconciliation Report: Compares actual performance against contract guarantees on discounts, dispensing fees, and rebates. Identifies contract shortfalls or overperformance and validates PBM compliance.
